steps.title: Solve by taking square roots
steps.content:
Take the square root of both sides of $x^2 = 64$:
$$x = \pm\sqrt{64} = \pm 8$$
The two solutions are $x = 8$ and $x = -8$.

steps.title: Check the listed values
steps.content: The choices include $-8$, and $-8$ is one of the two solutions. Verify it directly: $$(-8)^2=64.$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: Choice A is correct because $x=-8$ satisfies the equation.
